title: The Whole Time Wip
description: 'A show for burnt-out millennials who now understand why they liked Mulan so much as a child to feel seen, as well as their Guardian-reading aunt who will come away with a catchy definition of what non-binary actually means.' The Whole Time is a standup comedy show, with a mix of autobiographical and observational humour. The show focuses on the recurring theme of realising things about my identity far later in life than I should have done, covering topics like queer dating / avoiding rock climbing, awkward therapy appointments, tedious gender clinic forms, being a nonbinary mess and just wishing to be a rat.
